memoryArtifacts.headline: Will of Anne Countess of Stafford
memoryArtifacts.description:
ANN COUNTESS OF STAFFORD
 
In Dei nomine, Amen. I Anne Countess of Stafford, Bockingh, Herford', and Northampton, and Lady of Breknoc, of hool and avised mynde, ordeyne and make my testament in Englis …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne of Gloucester於1383年4月30日出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Thomas of Woodstock28歲，母親Eleanor de Bohun11380歲。她於1391年6月與Thomas Stafford 3rd Earl of Stafford結婚。她去世於1438年10月16日在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年55歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne of Gloucester于1383年4月30日出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Thomas of Woodstock28岁，母亲Eleanor de Bohun11380岁。她于1391年6月与Thomas Stafford 3rd Earl of Stafford结婚。她去世于1438年10月16日在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年55岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne of Gloucester was born on 30 April 1383, in Essex, England, her father, Thomas of Woodstock, was 28 and her mother, Eleanor de Bohun, was 11380. She married Thomas Stafford 3rd Earl of Stafford in June 1391. She died on 16 October 1438, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne of Gloucester est née le 30 avril 1383, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas of Woodstock, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Bohun, avait 11380 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Stafford 3rd Earl of Stafford en juin 1391. Elle est décédée le 16 octobre 1438, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne of Gloucester am 30. April 1383 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas of Woodstock 28 und ihre Mutter Eleanor de Bohun 11380. Sie hat im Juni 1391 Thomas Stafford 3rd Earl of Stafford geheiratet. Sie starb am 16. Oktober 1438 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne of Gloucester è nata il il 30 aprile 1383 nel Essex, England, sua padre, Thomas of Woodstock, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Eleanor de Bohun, aveva 11380 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Stafford 3rd Earl of Stafford nel giugno 1391. Morì il 16 ottobre 1438, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne of Gloucesterが1383年4月30日にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Thomas of Woodstockは28歳，母Eleanor de Bohunは11380歳であった。1391年6月にThomas Stafford 3rd Earl of Staffordと結婚した。彼女は1438年10月16日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで55歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアランソニー セクウンダ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne of Gloucester(이)가 1383년 4월 30일 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas of Woodstock(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Bohun(은)는 11380세였다. 그녀는 1391년 6월 Thomas Stafford 3rd Earl of Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1438년 10월 16일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 랜서니 세쿤다 플리오리에 묻혔다.

mn.30 April 1383–16 October 1438: 1383 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 30–1438 оны Аравдугаар сарын 16
mn.Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United: Stafford, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.30 April 1383–16 October 1438: 30 de abril de 1383–16 de outubro de 1438
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne of Gloucester nasceu em 30 de abril de 1383, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas of Woodstock, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Bohun, tinha 11380 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Stafford 3rd Earl of Stafford em junho de 1391. Ela faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1438, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne of Gloucester родилась 30 апреля 1383 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas of Woodstock было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Bohun, 11380. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Stafford 3rd Earl of Stafford июнь 1391 г. Она умерла 16 октября 1438 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности ллантони секунда приори, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.30 April 1383–16 October 1438: 30 de abril de 1383–16 de octubre de 1438
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne of Gloucester nació el 30 de abril de 1383, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas of Woodstock, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Bohun, tenía 11380 años. Se casó con Thomas Stafford 3rd Earl of Stafford en junio de 1391. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1438, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
